name: Process Launched from Unusual Directory
notes: This rule triggers when a process is launched from an unusual directory.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created
when the event matches Process Path IMATCHES '(.\:\\*Perflogs.*)|(.*((\$Recycle\.bin)|(\\*Users\\*All\sUsers)).*)' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Process Launched from Unusual Directory on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created
AND when the event matches Process Path IMATCHES '(.\:\\*Perflogs.*)|(.*((\$Recycle\.bin)|(\\*Users\\*All\sUsers)).*)' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Process Started from Unusual Directories (Recycle.bin ..)
Event description: Process Started from Unusual Directories (Recycle.bin, ..)
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
Add the "sourceIP" of the event or flow payload to the Reference Set "Compromised Hosts"
